---
name: "🛡️ Epic Request"
about: "Template for proposing a new epic"
title: "🛡️ [Brief, descriptive title of the Epic]"
labels: ["epic"]
assignees: []
---

# ✨ Epic Overview

**Title:**  
_A concise, descriptive name for the epic._

**Description:**  
As a **[persona]**,  
I want to **[goal]**,  
so I can **[benefit]**.

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Clearly defined functional and non-functional requirements.
- [ ] Use Feature Toggle to enable/disable this epic.
- [ ] Includes accessibility and performance considerations.
- [ ] Validated through automated and/or manual testing.
- [ ] Reviewed and approved by stakeholders.

---

## 📌 Scope & Boundaries

- **In Scope:**  
  _List what is included in this epic._

- **Out of Scope:**  
  _Clarify what is explicitly excluded to avoid scope creep._

---

## 🧩 Dependencies & Integration

- _Mention any related features, services, APIs, or teams involved._
- _Include links to relevant tickets or epics._

---

## 📎 Additional Information

- _Any background context, business rules, or constraints._
- _Links to related discussions, decisions, or research._

---

## 🎨 Mockups & Design Assets

- _Attach or link to annotated screenshots, Figma files, screen recordings, etc._
- _Include version history if applicable._

---

## 📚 Documentation
- [User Documentation- [Technical Documentation- Library/API References
- [Onboarding or Training Materials
---

## 🛠️ Implementation Notes (Optional)

- _Tips for developers, known challenges, or architectural decisions._
- _Suggested libraries, patterns, or reusable components._
``
